_comment: DaemonCraft embodied-service tunable parameters. Single source of truth.

scanning._note: When specific blocks are requested, find_blocks is used (efficient, no practical limit)

ollama._note: Don't touch temperature/top_p/min_p — Modelfile defaults are canonical

dispatch._note: Recovery timeout is independent of caller deadline

tools._note: Set to array of tool names to restrict defaults. null = use all 42 supported.
